kendraranking.executionplan.capacityunit: Sets additional capacity units configured for your rescore execution plan. A rescore execution plan is an Amazon Kendra Intelligent Ranking resource used for provisioning the `Rescore` API. You can add and remove capacity units to fit your usage requirements.

kendraranking.executionplan.capacityunit.Description: The amount of extra capacity for your rescore execution plan.  A single extra capacity unit for a rescore execution plan provides 0.01 rescore requests per second. You can add up to 1000 extra capacity units.
